title: Abridon Shipyard
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:Sayan.jpg]] |name=Abridon Shipyard |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Abridon Nationalists]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} {{Quote|General, the shipyard now belongs to the Rebel Alliance.''"
"''The shipyard belongs to the Abridon people. We're just borrowing it for a little while.|[[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Tyr Taskeen]] after capturing the shipyards|''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''}} The '''Abridon Shipyard''' was a manufacturing center in the city of [[Sayan]] on [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]]. ==Characteristics== The shipyard was located on an island just off the coast and connected by a pair of causeways to the mainland. Among other products, it produced [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]]. ==History== In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Abridon Nationalists]] [[Uprising on Abridon|took control of Abridon]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] [[Massacre on Abridon|responded]] swiftly, taking back the [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]] and driving the forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] off the planet. However, Sayan remained a hotbed of Nationalist sentiment. Running street battles between Imperial forces and Nationalists were common. At some point, the Empire became so fed up with Sayan's resistance that it moved in artillery platforms and began leveling the city. [[File:Sayan_A-wings.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] take off from the Shipyard.]] When [[Brenn Tantor]], the Imperial general who had reconquered the planet earlier, [[Liberation of Abridon|returned]] as a Rebel, he captured the Government Center and freed [[Hamman Flatt]], a leader of the Abridon Nationalists. Flatt offered the Rebel Alliance a shipment of A-wings if Tantor would free Sayan. Tantor covertly eased a [[Hover Transport TC9|Hover Transport]] full of pilots, the [[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB]], and an armed escort through the city, using [[Scanner Jammer]]s and the confusion of the city's battles for cover. He captured the shipyard, which he then used as a base of operations to land reinforcements and eliminate all Imperial forces in the city. The A-wings were delivered to the Rebellion unharmed. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Abridon locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire shipyards]] [[Category:Planetary shipyards]]
